display_text: Headdress, Cost: 425: Creates a passive Regeneration Aura that grants 2 health regeneration to all allied units within a 1200 radius. Provides no active abilities. A team-oriented item that enhances the sustain of grouped allies during pushes or defensive holds. Stats: Aura Radius: 1200, Aura Regen: 2 HP/sec.
